message:
fix(runtime): resolve compilation errors for spawn_local support

- Remove duplicate local module declaration in runtime/mod.rs
- Fix partial move error in worker.rs by tracking is_local before match
- Fix unused variable warning in stream.rs test
- Add #[allow(dead_code)] to TrackedFuture test helper

These fixes enable cargo check to pass after the spawn_local feature
was added. The inline local module in mod.rs now correctly defines
the thread-local storage for !Send tasks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
